name: Boston Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 oz can navy beans, drained and rinsed
15 oz can red beans, drained and rinsed
15 oz can black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the drained and rinsed navy beans, red beans, and black beans in a large bowl.
2. Add the sliced celery and green onion to the bowl with the beans.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the vinegar, molasses, Dijon-style mustard, and pepper until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the bean mixture and stir to coat evenly.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 4 to 24 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Just before serving, add the torn endive to the salad and give it a final stir.
